item.title: MySQL Database to MSSQL Server Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MySQL Database to MSSQL Server Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
MySQL Database to MSSQL Server Converter
(Utilities)
MySQL to MSSQL db converter software is a powerful and reliable tool used to convert the MySQL database records to MSSQL server. MySQL to MSSQL database converter utility support all MySQL data type and attributes and works with all main versions of MySQL (8.3.0, 4.0, 4.1 and 5.0). MySQL to MSSQL database migration tool can convert entire database records or selected table records according to your requirement. MySQL to MSSQL db converter utility provides the GUI interface so it is easy to use and does not need any technical skills to operate it. MySQL to MSSQL database migration utility supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 and also support all data types of MySQL database. MySQL to MSSQL converter software is powerful and fastest tool which makes the conversion from MySQL server to MSSQL server very quickly, you can convert your large database which contains thousands of records in a very few seconds. MySQL to MSSQL db converter utility supports default values, null values, indexes, unique key, primary key, foreign key etc. MySQL to MSSQL database conversion tool supports all data types of MySQL server like numeric, date, time, string etc. Automatic MySQL to MSSQL database converter software maintains database integrity and Unicode architecture while converting database from MySQL server to MSSQL table records.Software Features:* Tool supports default values, null values, unique and primary key.* Software provides user friendly GUI architecture.*Software supports all MySQL data types and attributes.*You can convert database into new MSSQL database or overwrite existing database.*Application does not require any technical knowledge to operate it.

[read more]

MySQL Database to MSSQL Server Converter

item.title: Softaken Split vCard Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken Split vCard Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: fileconversion
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken Split vCard Software
(Utilities)
Utilize the Split vCard software to easily break any single big-size VCF contact file into multiple parts without taking a long time. The software can fragment various contacts from a single file. The utility is fully standalone to split VCF contacts. Users can choose any large VCF contact file without any data size limitation. The utility works with all Windows OS versions without any problems. While using this program, users do not need to download another application to split VCF contacts. There are zero percentage chances of data deletion. Any type of user can make use of this program without any hurdles or technical knowledge. The easy-to-operate software didn't take long to divide up a contact file. If you want to see more advanced features of this software, then go to the official website.
Read More: https://www.softakensoftware.com/split-vcard.html
[read more]

item.title: 001Micron USB Drive Recovery Review [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: 001Micron USB Drive Recovery Review [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
001Micron USB Drive Recovery Review
(Utilities)
USB memory key drive restoration utility is an advanced data recovery application to salvage and repair your corrupted files. USB flash stick retrieval software uses best algorithm to restore your lost images, deleted pictures, corrupted photo, erased audio video clippings, inaccessible folders etc from removable storage media. USB media data recovery program ensures data recovery even after deleted due to virus infection, software malfunction, hardware corruption, power failure, unnecessary formatting or partition error etc. Bootable USB flash drive recovery utility is an effective and efficient tool can support all major brands of detachable USB data storage devices including Nikon, Olympus, Casio, Panasonic, HP, Konica, Minolta, Samsung, Sanyo, Argus, BenQ, Canon, Kodak, Fuji film, Epson, Sony etc. Flash memory drive data rescue solution salvage data backup lost due to missing or overwritten. USB flash memory drive restoration tool restores previously existing or hidden data stored in your external USB media. Professional USB pen drive recovery company support all capacities USB drives like 16 GB, 32 GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 512 GB. Pen drive recovery reviews deleted or lost gif, jpg, mpeg, jpeg, wav, bmp, riff, tiff, midi files, mov, avi, xls, ppt, mdb, doc, exe, zip, txt, web content etc. Jump drive recovery solution is safe, easy to use and non destructive tool does not harm your other stored content. Feature: * USB flash drive recovery tool support data rescue on all windows based operating system including Windows 11, Win 10, Win 8. * Key drive recovery reviews files and folders in case Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Detected error messages are shown by system while accessing your Jump drive. * Thumb drive recovery solution has user friendly GUI

[read more]

item.title: Recover Digital Camera [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Digital Camera [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Digital Camera
(Utilities)
Digital camera data retrieval software supports all foremost digital cameras manufactures like sony, kodak, nikon, canon, acer, samsung, panasonic, fujifilm, sigma, casio, hp, ge, pelican, eo tech etc. Digital camera image revival tool salvage all deleted data due any cause like mistakenly formatted digital camera device, virus attack, human error, improper handling device and other similar reason. Software is able to revive freshly deleted or permanently lost image file in proper way. Easy to use recover digital camera utility provides interactive graphical interface to easily rescue all missing and deleted images by any binger computer users no need to call any image recovery specialist. Digital data recovery application has complete scanning facility user can easily view entire important pictures and resave all the regaining data at particular location. Freeware digital camera recovery tool offers a flexible method for regaining all proficient digital data in same as original conditions in very less time. Recover digital camera software help to speedily renovate missing photos, images in specific manner. Digital camera data regaining program efficiently runs on all windows operating system including windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7. Digital camera misplaced pictures revival software remake all damage or lost digital movie, pictures, audio sings, photos and many other file.Feature:* Digital data recovery program rapidly restore accidentally deleted or formatted memorable photograph from digital camera.* Software easily recovers lost files due to digital camera fault, human mistakes and hardware malfunction by fewer mouse clicks.* User friendly recover digital camera application has highly interactive feature user can easily learn all lost data procedure in very easy manners.* Photo recovery program is reliable, inexpensive, consistent and affordable for all professional photographers and unprofessional person.

[read more]

item.title: Rescue Data Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Rescue Data Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: macdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Rescue Data Mac
(Utilities)
Affordable rescue data Mac program at datarecoverymac.us empowers user to retrieve all form of digital data once stored in your mobile phone storage memory that have been lost due to human error of mishandling mobile phone device. Creative mobile phone data recovery software for Macintosh OS provides user facility to restore complete scanned data or specified media files at desired location of system hard disk drive storage.

Title: Discover Every Detail with Maximum Zoom APK 1.0.18 - Ad-Free Exploration
Embark on an immersive journey of discovery with Maximum Zoom APK version 1.0.18! Experience the world like never before with unparalleled zoom capabilities and enjoy uninterrupted exploration with a completely ad-free experience.

Why Choose Maximum Zoom APK 1.0.18?
Ad-Free Experience: Immerse yourself in exploration without any distractions from ads, allowing you to focus entirely on discovering new horizons.
Unmatched Zoom Capabilities: Dive deep into every detail with maximum zoom capabilities, revealing hidden nuances and intricate features.
Intuitive Interface: Navigate seamlessly through the app's user-friendly interface, making exploration effortless and enjoyable for users of all levels.
Enhanced Clarity: Experience crystal-clear images and videos, ensuring that every detail is captured with precision and clarity.
Regular Updates: Stay up-to-date with regular updates, ensuring that you always have access to the latest features and improvements.

Spotify Premium APK 8.9.36.616 Free Download For Android
(Various Games)
Elevate your music experience with the Spotify Premium Game APK 8.9.36.616. This innovative game offers an immersive journey into the world of unlimited music, providing users with exclusive features and benefits that enhance their listening pleasure. With Spotify Premium, users can enjoy ad-free streaming, offline access, and high-quality audio, revolutionizing how they enjoy their favorite tunes.
Unlock a World of Musical Possibilities with Spotify Premium Game:

Unrestricted Access: Dive into a vast collection of music from all genres, artists, and eras. With Spotify Premium, users have access to millions of tracks, allowing them to explore new sounds and rediscover old favorites effortlessly.
Ad-Free Listening: Say goodbye to interruptions and enjoy uninterrupted music streaming with Spotify Premium. By eliminating ads, users can immerse themselves fully in their music without distractions, ensuring a seamless listening experience every time.
High-Quality Audio: Immerse yourself in crystal-clear sound with Spotify Premium's high-quality audio streaming. Experience music the way it's meant to be heard, with rich tones and dynamic range that bring every song to life.

item.title: Camera Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
Download software from www.001micron.com. Cost effective recovery application gives effective solution to restore all deleted images and photographs from digital camera in minimal time. Restore application is capable to revive lost images save in different format like BMP, AVI, PNG, TIFF, MPEG etc. Retrieval software is used to recover lost picture files that deleted by some common human mistake. Camera Data Recovery application is capable to restore lost images that support major digital camera like shoot camera, specialty camera, novelty camera etc. simple and best restoration program provides facility to recover missing photographs from camera without any technical knowledge. Easy to download revive application is used to restore all deleted photographs support some common errors like ‘Drive not detected’ is displayed while accessing your digital camera on the Computer PC. Website offers restore lost images and snaps from your digital camera. Simple and best recovery application is helpful to restore priceless picture and snaps from digital camera storage media. Restoration software provides facility to revive files lost due to common human mistake, media formats or hardware malfunction. Company offers revive application recover audio and video clips digital flash cameras devices in an efficient manner. Cost effective regain application is able to recover lost picture files that easy to operate and run software. Restoration software gives effective solution to recover all deleted important photographs from digital camera in less time. Features: * Recovery application is capable to restore deleted picture files and folder from digital flash cameras device. *restoration software gives easy solution to restore all lost priceless picture and images save in different format like GIF, JPG, BMP etc. *Retrieval program has ability to restore missing audio and video clips from different cameras like specialty camera, novelty camera etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Camera Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
Download software from www.001micron.com. Cost effective recovery application gives effective solution to restore all deleted images and photographs from digital camera in minimal time. Restore application is capable to revive lost images save in different format like BMP, AVI, PNG, TIFF, MPEG etc. Retrieval software is used to recover lost picture files that deleted by some common human mistake. Camera Data Recovery application is capable to restore lost images that support major digital camera like shoot camera, specialty camera, novelty camera etc. simple and best restoration program provides facility to recover missing photographs from camera without any technical knowledge. Easy to download revive application is used to restore all deleted photographs support some common errors like ‘Drive not detected’ is displayed while accessing your digital camera on the Computer PC. Website offers restore lost images and snaps from your digital camera. Simple and best recovery application is helpful to restore priceless picture and snaps from digital camera storage media. Restoration software provides facility to revive files lost due to common human mistake, media formats or hardware malfunction. Camera Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
Download software from www.001micron.com. Cost effective recovery application gives effective solution to restore all deleted images and photographs from digital camera in minimal time. Restore application is capable to revive lost images save in different format like BMP, AVI, PNG, TIFF, MPEG etc. Retrieval software is used to recover lost picture files that deleted by some common human mistake. Camera Data Recovery application is capable to restore lost images that support major digital camera like shoot camera, specialty camera, novelty camera etc. simple and best restoration program provides facility to recover missing photographs from camera without any technical knowledge. Website offers restore lost images and snaps from your digital camera. Simple and best recovery application is helpful to restore priceless picture and snaps from digital camera storage media. Restoration software provides facility to revive files lost due to common human mistake, media formats or hardware malfunction. Company offers revive application recover audio and video clips digital flash cameras devices in an efficient manner. Restoration software gives effective solution to recover all deleted important photographs from digital camera in less time.
